questions.question: Write a step-by-step example of how Bubble Sort works on the array [64, 25, 12, 22, 11]
questions.hint: Describe the process of repeatedly swapping adjacent elements

questions.question: Compare Bubble Sort and Insertion Sort in terms of time complexity. Which one is more efficient? Provide reasons to support your answer.
questions.hint: Consider the average and worst-case scenarios for both algorithms

questions.question: A list of 20 elements is sorted using Bubble Sort. It is found that the number of swaps performed is 19. What can be concluded about the initial order of the list?
questions.hint: Think about the nature of Bubble Sort and its effect on the list
